title: project-calibration-real-typescript-web-fixture
rawUserRequest: 执行项目校准计划工单 9：建立可安装、可构建、可测试、可升级的真实 TypeScript Web Fixture，执行 Install、Configure、Normal Work Item、Ambiguous Request、Critical Domain Change、Upgrade、Rollback、Release Check；真实执行与 not_run 必须可复核，不把 Manifest Simulation 写成真实运行；不启动工单 1。

declaredIntent.summary: Make the TypeScript web lifecycle fixture execute real local npm phases and distinguish unavailable toolchains from simulated evidence.

outOfScope: External provider or enterprise identity evidence
Starting Work Item 1 or later Work Items

sources.reason: Executes the real npm install/build/test/lint/format entrypoints.
Aggregates real fixture evidence and preserves the external evidence boundary.
Verifies simulated manifest evidence is distinct from real fixture execution.
Separates deterministic manifest simulation from real fixture evidence.
Documents the evidence boundary and unavailable-toolchain behavior.

riskAssessment.reason: Local npm execution is deterministic when Node/npm are available; unavailable toolchains must be recorded as not_run and never inferred as passed.

executionDecision.reason: The user authorized serial execution of this bounded fixture Work Item.

preReviewWarnings: Reject simulated phase records as real execution; verify command, status, and evidence boundary for every phase.

checkpointPolicy.reason: Record at least one checkpoint before finishing to reduce mid-task drift.

acceptance: The TypeScript fixture has real npm entrypoints for install, build, test, lint, and format checks, with a lifecycle command covering all eight required phases.
Each phase records command/evidence and uses local_real_execution, blocked, or not_run explicitly; unavailable npm never becomes passed evidence.
Tests execute the fixture and documentation distinguishes real local evidence from deterministic manifest simulation and external evidence not_run.
guidelines: New public APIs must be documented.
Do not import internal modules from other features.

intent.problem: The repository has a TypeScript fixture manifest and lifecycle shape, but the aggregate harness can represent phases without proving that the real npm fixture executed them.
constraints: Keep the fixture dependency-light and local; do not claim provider, identity, sandbox, immutable audit, or enterprise evidence.
Record unavailable Node/npm toolchains as not_run with a reason.
Do not start Work Item 1 or later Work Items.
intent.rationale: A real executable fixture plus explicit evidence kinds makes lifecycle verification reproducible and prevents simulation from being presented as execution.

scenarioCoverage.scenario: Node/npm available and install/build/test/lint/format commands pass
Ambiguous and critical-domain phases remain blocked with resume conditions
Provider or unavailable toolchain evidence is explicit not_run, not simulated pass

restrictedWriteApproval.reason: The user explicitly authorized serial execution of the recalibration plan, including this fixture Work Item.

rollbackNote: Revert this Work Item diff and restore related tests and docs.
